name: 规划与推理工作流
summary: 从一次性回答升级为可分阶段规划、探索与执行的工作方式。
summary_en: Evolved from one-shot answers to multi-phase planning, exploration, and execution workflows.

name: 执行与工作区操作
summary: Claude Code 从读代码走向能在真实工作区中稳定执行多步任务。
summary_en: From reading code to reliably executing multi-step tasks in real workspaces.

name: 记忆与长上下文
summary: Claude Code 逐步具备更长的任务记忆、更稳的会话延续与更大的上下文吞吐。
summary_en: Progressively gained longer task memory, stabler session continuity, and larger context throughput.

name: 自动化与无人值守
summary: Claude Code 开始承担持续运行、定时触发和后台完成的工作。
summary_en: Began handling continuous, scheduled, and background tasks autonomously.

name: 委派与协作
summary: 工作逐渐可以拆给多个子代理、团队成员和远端入口协同完成。
summary_en: Work can now be split across subagents, team members, and remote endpoints.

name: 连接器与生态扩展
summary: Claude Code 从单体工具扩展为连接外部系统、插件、技能与 SDK 的平台。
summary_en: Expanded from a standalone tool into a platform connecting external systems, plugins, skills, and SDKs.

name: 多模态与交互界面
summary: 输入输出方式从纯终端文本扩展到图片、PDF、语音、桌面与远程界面。
summary_en: I/O expanded from terminal text to images, PDFs, voice, desktop, and remote interfaces.

name: 安全、权限与治理
summary: 随着能力增强，Claude Code 也持续补强权限、安全审计与企业治理。
summary_en: As capabilities grew, permissions, security auditing, and enterprise governance kept pace.
